title: survival tweaks
description: the small tweaks you've always wanted without affecting the vanilla experince under the 16x pixel format. low lag.
body:
those small tweaks you've always wanted without affecting the vanilla experince under the 16x pixel format with low lag.

This texture pack is perfect for anyone - like me - who enjoys the already exisiting vanilla feel of the game but who also wants to see some small adjustments.

The list of features include with respective tags:
- purple hearts, exp, exp bar - Decoration, utility, tweaks, gui.
- armor above hotbar is diamond - tweaks, utility, gui.
- lush foliage and grass everywhere - decoration, tweaks.
- brown leather - tweaks, vanilla like, items.
- connected textures - tweaks, utility, tweaks, blocks.
- golden trident - tweaks.
- beautiful shields - tweaks.
- purple slime - tweaks, blocks.
- overworld menu backround - tweaks, decoration.
- dark mode GUI
- Adjusted Netherite Textures to include Diamond accents (Tools & Armour) - items
- darker books - items
- darker sticks - items
- pumpkin stems - models, blocks, tweaks, decoration
- smoother cobblestone - blocks.
- retextured emeralds to rubies - items
- pre 1.19 boat texture - items, tweaks.
- desaturated books - blocks
- smoother bedrock - blocks
- clear destroy animation - blocks, tweaks
- removed icky gray pixels from dirt - blocks, tweaks
- some wool is smoother - blocks, tweaks
- tall wheat - models, tweaks.
- revamped birch and taiga biomes 
- rename a netherite "Pride Sword" to give a rainbow texture and express your support for LGBTQ+ individuals. - tweaks, utility, equipment..
- low fire - pvp
- purple slime - entities, items, blocks.
- removed pumpkin blur, underwater texture and vignette - tweaks, gui
- saturated color map - tweaks, environment.

The following features require optifine:
- revamped birch and taiga biomes
- rename a netherite "Pride Sword" to give a rainbow texture and express your support for LGBTQ+ individuals.
- recoloured exp bar
